description_long: This house features a modern, multi-volume design with a combination of flat and hipped roofs. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with a wooden door, flanked by large windows and a small covered porch. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige color, contrasted by dark gray roofing and window frames. The house includes a two-car garage with paneled doors and a paved driveway leading up to the entrance. Large, floor-to-ceiling windows dominate one side of the house, providing ample natural light to the interior. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with smaller windows and a more subdued appearance.
description: A modern, multi-volume house with a mix of flat and hipped roofs, large windows, and a prominent entryway with a garage and paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, garage, paved driveway, and large windows beside the door.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the expansive floor-to-ceiling windows and the flat-roofed section of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal detailing, featuring two small windows and a simple wall finish.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows and the continuation of the driveway paving.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wooden door, small covered porch, steps, and adjacent large windows
